params.title: Component parameters
params.description: Parameters of the Positon component class - 'dest_x', 'dest_y', 'tile_dest_x', 'tile_dest_y', 'dest_map', 'key'. Coordinates (x or tile_x) and (y or tile_y) together with the map should be specified.

dest_x.title: X-axis position
dest_x.description: X-axis position in pixels on the target map.

tile_dest_x.title: X-axis position in tiles
tile_dest_x.description: X-axis position in tiles on the target map.

dest_y.title: Y-axis position
dest_y.description: Y-axis position in pixels on the target map.

tile_dest_y.title: Y-axis position in tiles
tile_dest_y.description: Y-axis position in tiles on the map.

dest_map.title: Map name
dest_map.description: Name of the map where entity is present.

cond_coords_required.description: One of duo 'dest_x', 'tile_dest_x' or 'dest_y', 'tile_dest_y' must be always defined.

cond_either_x_or_tile_x_required.description: Either 'dest_x' or 'tile_dest_x' parameter must be present.

cond_either_y_or_tile_y_required.description: Either 'dest_y' or 'tile_dest_y' parameter must be present.
